targets.note: api_prod rejects HMAC (RS256-only); live probe used api_dev with HMAC matching CLERK_SECRET_KEY

tenant.label: QA Mobile tenant (only membership that accepted our token)

web_prod.body:
<!doctype html>
<html lang="en">
  <head>
    <meta charset="UTF-8" />
    <meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0" />
    <title>Rivet — Your AI
